transcript: Speaker A: क्या हो अगर आपको 7 दिन के लिए USA में रहना पड़े? पहले ही दिन नोटिस आ जाएगा कि अगर आपको इंग्लिश नहीं आती तो आपको USA छोड़ना पड़ेगा। आप घबरा जाते हो, तभी आपको याद आता है MySivi ऐप। आप तुरंत स्मार्टफोन से MySivi डाउनलोड करते हो और AI टीचर के साथ रोज़ प्रैक्टिस शुरू करते हो। वो आपकी हर गलती इंस्टेंटली करेक्ट करता है, बिना जजमेंट के। और धीरे-धीरे आपकी इंग्लिश फ्लूएंट होने लगती है। 7 दिन बाद पुलिस वेरिफिकेशन के लिए आती है। आप उनसे कॉन्फिडेंटली इंग्लिश में बात करते हो। आपकी इंग्लिश सुनकर वो मुस्कुराते हैं और कहते हैं, 'Your English is impressive. Welcome to America.' अगर आपको भी फ्लूएंटली इंग्लिश बोलनी है, तो MySivi ऐप अभी डाउनलोड करो। [What if you had to live in the USA for 7 days? On the very first day, a notice will arrive saying that if you don't know English, you will have to leave the USA. You get scared, then you remember the MySivi app. You immediately download MySivi on your smartphone and start practicing daily with the AI teacher. It instantly corrects your every mistake, without judgment. And gradually, your English starts becoming fluent. After 7 days, the police come for verification. You confidently speak to them in English. Hearing your English, they smile and say, 'Your English is impressive. Welcome to America.' If you also want to speak English fluently, download the MySivi app now.]
on_screen_text: KYA HO AGAR [What if], 7 DIN KE LIYE [For 7 days], ENGLISH REQUIRED, AAP GHABRA [You get scared], TABHI [Then], MYSIVI APP, AAP TURANT [You immediately], MYSIVI, AI TEACHER, ROZ PRACTICE [Daily practice], INSTANTLY CORRECT, BINA [Without], AUR [And], FLUENT, 7 DIN BAAD [After 7 days], CONFIDENTLY, ENGLISH, AAPKI [Your], YOUR ENGLISH IS IMPRESSIVE, WELCOME TO AMERICA, FLUENTLY, MYSIVI APP, MySivi AI English Speaking..., Master Spoken Eng..., Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MyS fast
summary: An AI-generated narrative about a skeleton character facing deportation from the US unless they learn English in 7 days. The character uses the MySivi app to practice with an AI teacher, successfully passes a police check, and encourages viewers to download the app.
